potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall receive a video suggestion request from a user.
The system shall identify the user who made the video suggestion request.
The system shall gather different types of videos simultaneously based on the user's profile or preferences.
The system shall send the suggested videos to the user.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, different types of videos are gathered at the same time. These may include videos watched by similar users, trending videos from the user’s area, videos with similar tags, videos from similar genres, and promoted videos.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall gather different types of videos simultaneously based on the user's profile or preferences.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall identify the user who made the video suggestion request.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the system identifies the user, it only mentions identifying the user after receiving the request.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall gather different types of videos simultaneously based on the user's profile or preferences.
hallucinations.reason: While this is implied in the source text, it is not explicitly stated as a requirement. The source text mentions gathering videos 'based on the user’s profile or preferences' but does not use these exact words.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall gather different types of videos simultaneously based on the user's profile or preferences.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is somewhat ambiguous as it implies a specific method (based on the user's profile or preferences) which is not explicitly stated in the source text.
